# ArchiveHeader.EntryFilterData.header(_:)

**Case**

An enumeration that represents an archive header.

## Declaration

```swift
case header(ArchiveHeader)
```

## Enumeration Cases

- **ArchiveHeader.EntryFilterData.entryAttributes(_:)**: An enumeration that represents entry attributes.
- **ArchiveHeader.EntryFilterData.entryXAT(_:)**: An enumeration that represents extended attributes.
